name: Slash
description: US business banking and corporate cards from a fintech (not an FDIC-insured bank). Deposit accounts and the Slash Platinum Visa charge card are provided by Column N.A., Member FDIC, including FDIC pass-through insurance and Column’s deposit sweep arrangements with network banks. Digital-asset and stablecoin features involve third parties (e.g. Bridge Building Inc, Layer2 Financial, Inc.). Working-capital loans are arranged with Slope as technology partner and Lead Bank as lender. Slash Treasury is an advisory/brokerage stack through Atomic Invest and Atomic Brokerage (FINRA/SIPC). The platform markets AI/automation capabilities (e.g. Agents) and offers a hosted Model Context Protocol (MCP) server so AI clients can list Slash API endpoints, inspect schemas, and call the API; optional RSA public key encrypts PAN/CVV before data reaches the agent. Some capabilities are limited to the Pro plan. See Slash’s website legal footers for full terms.

partnerships.name: Column N.A.
partnerships.title: Banking, card issuance, and FDIC deposit insurance
partnerships.desription: Banking services and the Slash Platinum Visa charge card are provided by Column N.A., Member FDIC. Business checking deposits are FDIC-insured through Column and Column’s deposit sweep program (including placement with network banks; see Column’s sweep disclosures).

partnerships.name: Bridge Building Inc
partnerships.title: Digital assets and USDSL stablecoin
partnerships.desription: USDSL is issued and redeemed by Bridge Building Inc; Slash does not custody digital assets or guarantee redemptions. Global USD / USDSL and related digital-asset services are offered in partnership with third-party providers.

partnerships.name: Layer2 Financial, Inc.
partnerships.title: Cryptocurrency conversion (with Bridge Building Inc)
partnerships.desription: Eligible Slash Platinum users may hold crypto at Bridge Building Inc or Layer2 Financial, Inc.; those providers convert crypto to USD for transfer to the Slash Platinum account. Stablecoin custody and transfer may be provided by Bridge and/or Layer2.

partnerships.name: Slope
partnerships.title: Working capital (technology partner)
partnerships.desription: Slope is a financial technology company, not a bank; it partners on business-purpose lending that is originated by Lead Bank and subject to credit approval.

partnerships.name: Lead Bank
partnerships.title: Working capital lender
partnerships.desription: Business-purpose loans offered in the Slash flow are made by Lead Bank, subject to credit approval, disclosures, and program requirements described on Slash.

partnerships.name: Atomic Invest
partnerships.title: Slash Treasury — investment adviser
partnerships.desription: Slash Treasury is an investment advisory account provided by Atomic Invest (SEC-registered investment adviser). Yields and money-market options are variable; investments are not FDIC insured and may lose value.

partnerships.name: Atomic Brokerage
partnerships.title: Slash Treasury — broker-dealer
partnerships.desription: Brokerage services for Slash Treasury are provided by Atomic Brokerage, a registered broker-dealer and FINRA/SIPC member, as described in Atomic Treasury disclosures.
